case_title: GARY DE GUZMAN ET AL VS. FILAM RADIO USA LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FILAM RADIO USA LLC / FILAM RADIO-USA
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF'S GARY DE GUZMAN AND EDWINA ANIAG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT FILAM RADIO USA LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROLANDO RUBIO, C.E.O.. DEFENDANT BRYAN UCLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCEL BALMEO IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR ALL DEFENDANT'S. ALL DEFENDANT'S WAIVE RIGHT TO SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE SEPTEMBER 5TH HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S GARY DE GUZMAN AND EDWINA ANIAG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT FILAM RADIO USA LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROLANDO RUBIO, C.E.O.. DEFENDANT BRYAN UCLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCEL BALMEO IS PRESENT. PARTIES DECIDED TO ATTEMPT THEIR OWN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DE GUZMAN, GARY ANIAG, EDWINA AS TO DEFENDANT FILAM RADIO USA LLC / FILAM RADIO-USA UCOL, BRYAN BALMEO, MARCEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FILAM RADIO USA LLC / FILAM RADIO-USA
